veining. The rich color adds warmth, and
depth to any space. Each basin uniquely
patterned.
Alpi Verdi stone basins are
distinguished by their deep green tones
and flowing white veins. The stone
reflects the beauty of natural alpine
landscapes. Its rich color adds a sense
of luxury and tranquility. Alpi Verdi
blends well with wood, brass, and
neutral tones. A perfect balance of
elegance and nature-inspired design.
